section_name: Distinctive plates for members of AMVETS
text:
(1) Any member of AMVETS residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a license plate bearing the word “AMVETS”. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) The distinctive plate authorized herein shall be issued upon proof, satisfactory to the commissioner, that the applicant is a member of AMVETS.

(3) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article, provided, however, that an additional one-time service charge of ten dollars shall be charged for such plate.

(4) For the purposes of this section, “AMVETS” shall mean the veterans service organization chartered by congress as a membership corporation created pursuant to chapter 227 of title 36 of the United States code. * NB There are 2 § 404-dd’s
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14. Registration of Motor Vehicles
##### § 404-DD — Distinctive plates for members of AMVETS

(1) Any member of AMVETS residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a license plate bearing the word “AMVETS”. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) The distinctive plate authorized herein shall be issued upon proof, satisfactory to the commissioner, that the applicant is a member of AMVETS.

(3) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article, provided, however, that an additional one-time service charge of ten dollars shall be charged for such plate.

(4) For the purposes of this section, “AMVETS” shall mean the veterans service organization chartered by congress as a membership corporation created pursuant to chapter 227 of title 36 of the United States code. * NB There are 2 § 404-dd’s

*Last modified: Jan. 26, 2018*

subsections.text: Any member of AMVETS residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a license plate bearing the word “AMVETS”. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.
The distinctive plate authorized herein shall be issued upon proof, satisfactory to the commissioner, that the applicant is a member of AMVETS.

A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article, provided, however, that an additional one-time service charge of ten dollars shall be charged for such plate.

For the purposes of this section, “AMVETS” shall mean the veterans service organization chartered by congress as a membership corporation created pursuant to chapter 227 of title 36 of the United States code. * NB There are 2 § 404-dd’s
